impact: This advances the PP&D missing-information resolver by proving unresolved, source-backed user facts can become a minimal redacted questionnaire while preserving evidence links and refusing consequential DevHub actions without explicit confirmation.
summary: Add a deterministic missing-information questionnaire resolution fixture and focused validation test.
target_task: Task checkbox-90: Task checkbox-85: Add a missing-information resolution fixture that converts unresolved PP&D user facts into a minimal questionnaire while preserving source evidence, redaction, and action-classification guardrails.

command: files=$(find ppd -name '*.ts' -not -path '*/node_modules/*' -print); test -z "$files" || npx tsc --noEmit --target ES2020 --module ESNext --moduleResolution node --strict --skipLibCheck --types node $files
